pages.title: One stone, one block
pages.text: Imperfect rituals skip the full-array overhead. Place an $(l:bloodmagic:rituals/imperfect)Imperfect Ritual Stone$() with the right block directly on top of it, then right-click to trigger. The Arsenal ports four from 1.12:

pages.title: Enchant Reset
pages.text: Topper: $(item)Bookshelf$(). Removes all enchantments from the activator's held item, returning them as experience. A panic-button for misrolled enchanting-table results.

pages.title: Ice
pages.text: Topper: $(item)Ice$() or $(item)Packed Ice$(). Freezes a cone of water in front of the activator into ice. Traversal + terraforming convenience.

pages.title: Lightning
pages.text: Topper: $(item)Lightning Rod$() (previously an iron-on-gold variant in 1.12). Calls a bolt at the activator's feet — same use cases as the $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/sigils)Sigil of Lightning$(), without holding an item slot.

pages.title: Snow
pages.text: Topper: $(item)Snow Block$(). Layers snow in a radius around the stone. Quiet, cheap, visually useful.
